info.name: Microsoft Azure Azure Enterprise Knowledge Graph Service
info.description: Azure Enterprise Knowledge Graph Service is a platform for creating knowledge graphs at scale.

response.name: The resource provider should return 200 (OK) to indicate that the operation completed successfully.
